---
id: update-tag
title: "Update tag"
description: "Updates a tag name or color. `entity_type` is immutable and should not be sent."

hide_table_of_contents: true

  as={"h1"}

  children={"Update tag"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/api/v1/tags/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Updates a tag name or color. `entity_type` is immutable and should not be sent.
